markdown:
#  Sync Viewpoint® Vista™ Compliance Documents with Compliance in Commitments 
##  Background 
If your company has enabled the ERP Integrations tool and configured it to work with Vista®, your project's accountants can add compliance documents in Vista® toward subcontracts synced in Procore. This feature automatically imports the specified Vista® compliance documents into the Compliance tab on the Procore subcontract.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permission on the company's ERP Integrations tool.
  * **Requirements:**
    * The ERP Integrations tool must be configured for Vista®.
    * The Commitments tool must be active on the desired project(s).
    * The Compliance tab must also be enabled in the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Prerequisites:**
    * Procore Pay must be enabled on your project. See [Enable or Disable Procore Pay on Your Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/enable-or-disable-pay).
    * The 'Contract Compliant' payment requirement must be enabled in the company's Payments tool. See [Configure Payment Requirements: Commitment Requirements](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/configure-payment-requirements).
    * The subcontract for which the compliance documents are being imported must be exported to Vista®. See [Export a Commitment to an Integrated ERP System](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/export-a-commitment-to-an-integrated-erp-system).
    * The compliance documents must be added to the subcontract in Vista®.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Users cannot edit compliance documents for synced subcontracts in Procore.
    * Compliance documents for subcontracts synced with Procore are imported from Vista® every four hours.
    * For data mapping details synced between Procore Pay and Vista®, see [Procore Pay and ERP: Detailed Data Mapping](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-procore-pay-and-erp-detailed-data-mapping).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. In the **Contracts** tab, locate the desired subcontract.
  3. Click the **Number** link to open it.
  4. In the commitment, click the **Compliance** tab.
  5. Click the **Compliance** tab. A GREEN icon indicates that the compliance documents have successfully been synced.


## See Also
  * [Sync Viewpoint® Vista™ Payments with Payments Issued in Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/vista/tutorials/sync-viewpoint-vista-payments-with-payments-issued-in-commitments)
  * [Add Viewpoint® Vista™ Standard Cost Codes to a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/vista/tutorials/add-viewpoint-vista-standard-cost-codes-to-a-project)
  * [Vista® - Things to Know](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/vista/things-to-know)
title: Sync Viewpoint® Vista™ Compliance Documents with Compliance in Commitments
description: How to sync compliance documents added to subcontracts in Viewpoint® Vista™ with the Compliance tab in Procore commitments.
